steps.title: Keep one finite verb
steps.content: The main verb of the sentence is "analyzed." The blank should modify "researchers" without creating another finite verb before the main verb.

steps.title: Reject extra main verbs
steps.content: A, C, and D are finite verb phrases, so each competes with "analyzed" and creates a sentence error. The participle in the remaining choice forms a modifying phrase instead. The answer is B.
